hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && bash "$root/scripts/code_review_graph.sh" session-start || true
cat >/dev/null || true; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && bash "$root/scripts/code_review_graph.sh" enter-worktree || true
cat >/dev/null || true; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && bash "$root/scripts/code_review_graph.sh" update || true
